'''Altor 14''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Zoraster sector/Legends|Zoraster sector]], and the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Avogwi]] and [[Nuiwit]]. It was subjugated by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

==History==
Located on the edge of civilization, the planet was not discovered until [[15 BBY/Legends|15 BBY]] when the [[Rego Mineral Company]] ran across this mineral-rich planet. Landing on the desert world, the Company's representatives drew up a contract with the native Nuiwit, who agreed to open their mines to the foreign businessman. This did not bode well with the other native species, the Avogwi, as they viewed it as foolish to give away valuable resources to outsiders. The Nuiwit, being more advanced, dismissed the Avogwis' concerns and sold more and more contracts, making a very lucrative business in the exporting of minerals.<ref name="GG4" />

==Society and culture==
Because of the intense heat of the world, both native species based their society on the gathering and preservation of water. While the Avogwi were rather primitive while the Nuiwit were more advanced with cities and a agricultural system which flourished. It was rare to see either species off-world, but after the discovery of the world, both groups saw some emigration, with Avogwi finding work as the criminal element, while the Nuiwit took on more honest jobs.<ref name="GG4" />

==Behind the scenes==
The planet Altor 14 was created for ''[[Galaxy Guide 4: Alien Races]]'', published in [[1989]] and revised for a [[Galaxy Guide 4: Alien Races (Second Edition)|second edition]] in [[1994]]. It was later charted on a map of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] in ''[[The Essential Atlas]]''.
